candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred singular revenue line.
Duplicate/alternate revenue label with identical values; useful as fallback if reporting label changes.

variables.notes: Selected reported revenue labels as a priority list; do not sum.

No COGS candidates were provided. For this real-estate rental business, 'Operating expenses' appears to represent the direct property/service cost bucket (with components such as Maintenance, Property tax, Property Administration), which is the closest match to cost of sales. Manual review recommended because this label is outside the candidate list and classification can vary for property companies.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component, but only labor portion rather than full overhead.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No explicit fully populated SG&A total row is present. Chose overhead components instead: 'Central administration costs' and the explicit SG&A labor component. Excluded 'Operating expenses' because it appears to be direct property operating cost, closer to COGS than SG&A. Manual review because one selected row is outside the candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Central administration costs

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

Usable only if owner/parent equity line were unavailable; includes minority interest so less preferred.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.
Total liabilities and equity, not book equity.
